name: Scott Strazik
background: Scott Strazik is the Chief Executive Officer of GE Vernova. He has more than 20 years of operations and leadership experience. Prior to his current role, he served as CEO of GE’s Gas Power business and later as CEO of GE’s Power portfolio. He joined GE in 2000 and has held various leadership roles in finance, operations, and general management.

company_affiliations.name: General Electric Company
company_affiliations.title_or_role: CEO of GE Power (including Gas Power)
